updates.title: Hostname filter
updates.description: Hostname filters are a new type of filter within the existing Data Filter section of the Admin section. It allows customers to filter out (exclude) events based on their hostname (example: “google.com”).

updates.title: New Source Group field with update to Source Platform values for improved source analysis
updates.description: Source grouping is a new dimension concept that consolidates source values for common online platforms - Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok. A single value for a given source is vital for performance and attribution analysis (example: “Facebook”; not “f

updates.title: New Google Business Profile integration
updates.description: You can now centrally report on your local business, website, and app metrics. Link your Google Analytics properties with Google Business Profiles (GBP) directly within the Admin panel. This integration enables the seamless import of high-value first

updates.title: Data Manager API support for Google Analytics server-to-server events
updates.description: Data Manager API provides you with an alternative to Measurement Protocol (MP) for sending recommended and custom events directly to your Google Analytics property. You can send events to both your Google Analytics web and app data streams, provided

updates.title: New AI Assistant traffic measurement
updates.description: Google Analytics now provides a dedicated way to measure and analyze traffic originating from popular AI assistants. You can now identify how users are discovering your site through chatbots like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude via a new AI Assistant cha

updates.title: Conversion support in the Data API
updates.description: Cross-channel conversion reporting data is now available from the Google Analytics Data API in alpha for Google Analytics and Google Ads customers. Google Analytics developers can now gain programmatic access to the same paid and organic reporting da

updates.title: Configure your Google Analytics settings using Task Assistant
updates.description: To help you get the most out of your Google Analytics property, we are introducing Task Assistant. Task Assistant provides tailored recommendations to help you optimize your configuration and improve data collection,. Available from the left navigati

updates.title: Generated insights on the Home page
updates.description: We’ve added Generated insights to your Home page. This feature summarizes the top three data changes since your last visit, including key configuration updates, anomalies, and seasonality trends.This helps you quickly catch up on what’s happening in

updates.title: Conversion attribution analysis report (Beta)
updates.description: The Conversion attribution analysis report is a new addition to the advertising workspace that provides customers with the ability to uncover the full value of their marketing channels across the entire customer journey.

updates.title: Improved web conversion management and reporting capabilities for Google Ads customers (Beta)
updates.description: More flexible web conversion management tools and new cross-channel reporting features are now available for marketers and advertisers.

updates.title: Cross-channel budgeting (Beta)
updates.description: The Google Analytics team is excited to announce the release of cross-channel budgeting. Use cross-channel budgeting to track performance and optimize paid channel investments.

updates.title: Auto-configured key events for lead generation Business objective
updates.description: Analytics now automatically configures qualified and converted leads events as key events when the Business objective for lead generation is selected in order to guide clients towards the recommended best-practices for lead gen measurement. Once conf

updates.title: Cost data import: expanded data sources (beta)
updates.description: Additional data sources are now supported for cost data import in open beta. With this enhancement, you are able to import cost data from multiple sources such as:

updates.title: Annotations now have Analyst+ permissions
updates.description: Users with Analyst and above Google Analytics permissions can now create, edit, and delete annotations.

updates.title: Item data import improvements
updates.description: Item data import now allows importing item-scoped custom dimensions into Google Analytics. This provides greater flexibility to import item data without the need for item IDs, particularly beneficial for users with extensive product catalogs. Learn m

updates.title: Default reports and suggested audiences for lead generation customers
updates.description: We’re launching new reports and suggested audiences dedicated to customers whose goal is to generate leads.

updates.title: Import cost data from Reddit Ads
updates.description: You can now import cost data from Reddit through a seamless integration with Google Analytics. This enables advertisers to automatically track Reddit cost data within Google Analytics. Learn more about importing cost data from Reddit Ads.

updates.title: Improved conversion data completeness
updates.description: We’ve improved conversion data quality to prevent under-reporting of conversions for Google Analytics customers whose properties have 2 or more linked Google Ads accounts, and who have opted to credit paid and organic channels for web conversions the

updates.title: Improved ecommerce data availability and usability
updates.description: We’ve improved ecommerce data (item-scoped dimensions and metrics) availability and usability.

updates.title: Import cost data from Snap ads
updates.description: You can now import cost data from Snap through a seamless integration with Google Analytics. This enables advertisers to automatically track Snap cost data within Google Analytics.

updates.title: Google Analytics linking recommendation in Google Ads
updates.description: Customers who link their Google Ads or Google Marketing Platform accounts to a Google Analytics property are correlated with a 23% increase in conversions and a 10% reduction in cost per conversion.

updates.title: Import cost data from Pinterest Ads
updates.description: You can now import cost data from Pinterest through a seamless integration with Google Analytics. This enables advertisers to automatically track Pinterest cost data within Google Analytics.

updates.title: New diagnostic in Google Analytics for User-ID implementation issues
updates.description: We’ve launched a new diagnostic to alert users of problematic User-ID implementations. Properties impacted by errors in user-ID implementation will see various diagnostic alerts throughout Google Analytics. The diagnostics include guidance on how to

updates.title: Benchmarking support for unnormalized metrics
updates.description: We've expanded the Benchmarking feature in Google Analytics to give you more ways to compare your performance against others in your industry.

updates.title: Import cost data from Meta and TikTok ads
updates.description: You can now import cost data from Meta and TikTok through seamless integrations with Google Analytics. This enables advertisers to automatically track Meta and TikTok cost data within Google Analytics.

updates.title: User-provided data new infra
updates.description: New User-Provided Data (UPD) infrastructure has launched, allowing new UPD customers to implement UPD without feature degradations. This improves UPD for Conversion and Customer Match. Early adopters on the old infrastructure may still see some degra

updates.title: User-provided data attribution improvement
updates.description: Google Analytics improved the user-provided data (UPD) feature for better data quality and behavioral attribution. UPD now focuses on activation and Ads Conversions, improving Enhanced Conversions and Customer Match Audiences, and ensuring more accur

updates.title: Cost data import is now Campaign data import
updates.description: Google Analytics is updating the name of the existing Cost data import feature to Campaign data import.

updates.title: Display dynamic remarketing in Google Analytics
updates.description: With display dynamic remarketing for web now available in Google Analytics, you can take Google Ads remarketing further by showing website visitors personalized ads that contain products and services viewed on your site.

updates.title: New suggested audience templates for customer lifecycle goals
updates.description: Google Analytics has launched two new suggested audience templates to allow customers to quickly create audiences for:

updates.title: Analytics Advisor
updates.description: We are excited to announce the launch of Analytics Advisor. This is an agentic conversational AI assistant, powered by Gemini models, that Analytics customers can evoke in the Google Analytics user interface whenever they have questions or need assis

updates.title: Validate your data in AI Assistant
updates.description: You can use AI Assistant to validate the data quality of your Adobe Experience Platform datasets. Powered by Agent Orchestrator, the data validation capability can perform statistical and semantic validations on datasets, analyze dataset fields, identify data quality issues, and return natural langu

updates.title: Data Mirror
updates.description: Data Mirror is an Experience Platform capability that enables row-level change ingestion (change data capture) from external data warehouse solutions (Snowflake, Azure Databricks, and Google BigQuery) into Customer Journey Analytics using relational schemas. It preserves data relationships, enforces

updates.title: Content Analytics: Line visualization thumbnails and previews
updates.description: Thumbnails and previews are now available for assets and experiences in line visualizations for Content Analytics.

updates.title: Journey canvas enhancements
updates.description: The following enhancements are available in Journey canvas visualizations:

updates.title: CJA API Postman Collections
updates.description: A downloadable Postman collection is available for calling CJA API endpoints. For more information, see the analytics-cja-postman-collections Github repository.

updates.title: Content Analytics support for native mobile app experiences
updates.description: Organizations can extend their content performance analysis to iOS and Android apps, capturing image assets and granular experience elements to understand which in-app content drives user engagement and business outcomes. Insights are available for all Adobe Content Analytics customers.

updates.title: MCP servers for Customer Journey Analytics
updates.description: The Analytics MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers allow you to connect a supported MCP client to Adobe Customer Journey Analytics. Once connected, your MCP client can invoke product-specific tools to retrieve data, run queries, or perform supported operations as part of an LLM or agentic workflow.

updates.title: Italian language support
updates.description: The Italian locale (it-IT) is now supported in Analysis Workspace in Customer Journey Analytics. Customer Journey Analytics supports all languages that are supported in the Experience Platform UI, as described in Browser and language support for the Experience Platform UI. You can change your defaul

updates.title: Fallout visualization improvements
updates.description: The Fallout visualization includes the following enhancements: For more information, see Configure a fallout visualization.

updates.title: Panel breakdown
updates.description: The drop zone for a panel now offers the additional feature to break down (instead of segment) a panel based on a dimension.

updates.title: Data validation in the Adobe Engineering Agent
updates.description: New data validation skills are available within the Data Engineering Agent. These skills help teams quickly assess data quality directly in Adobe Experience Platform, before the data is analyzed in Customer Journey Analytics. Data validation skills enable on‑demand, field‑level, and dataset‑level va

updates.title: Data Insights Agent integration with Copilot
updates.description: The Data Insights Agent is now integrated with Microsoft Copilot, allowing you to interact with Customer Journey Analytics data using natural language prompts, directly within Microsoft tools, including Teams, Powerpoint, and more. For more information, see Adobe Marketing Agent for Microsoft 365 Co

updates.title: Hands-on tutorial for Analysis Workspace
updates.description: A new hands-on tutorial is now available to guide new users through the basics of using panels, visualizations, and components in Analysis Workspace. For more information, see Customer Journey Analytics landing page.

updates.title: Full table export improvements
updates.description: Full table export includes the following enhancements: Export creation and configuration enhancements Export management enhancements Calculated metric, segment, and dimension enhancements Administrative enhancements For more information, see the following resources:

updates.title: Update to the Approximate Count Distinct function
updates.description: The HLL probabilistic algorithm used in the Approximate Count Distinct function will soon be updated. The resulting output for numbers utilizing this function might change slightly from historical numbers, as follows: For more information about the Approximate Count Distinct function, see Approximat

updates.title: Report Builder: Administrator visibility to all scheduled workbooks
updates.description: The Report Builder Excel Add-in includes a new filter option that allows administrators to see all scheduled workbooks for a given org, regardless of who scheduled them. This filter option is available only for Analytics administrators. It is available on both the Workbook tab and the Legacy tab whe

updates.title: Datasets preview redesign in Connections
updates.description: When you add or edit datasets in a person-based connection, the experience to preview data is improved. For stitching enabled datasets, additional stitching metrics and information on bad ids are available.

updates.title: Content Analytics: Bar visualization thumbnails and previews
updates.description: Thumbnails and previews are available for assets and experiences in bar (stacked) and horizontal bar (stacked) visualizations for Content Analytics.

updates.title: Content Analytics: Scatter visualization thumbnails and previews
updates.description: Thumbnails and previews are available for assets and experiences in scatter visualizations for Content Analytics.

updates.title: Sort tables by multiple columns
updates.description: You can now sort the data of a freeform table by multiple columns in Analysis Workspace, whether they are dimensions or metrics. When you sort data for multiple columns, data is sorted according to the priority you assign to each column. Priority numbering is displayed next to the sort icon. For mor

updates.title: Include multiple dimension columns in a freeform table
updates.description: You can now include up to 5 dimension columns in a freeform table, allowing you to view multiple dimension items side by side. Each row of dimension items behaves like a single concatenated dimension item. You can apply filters, sorting, breakdowns, and more to freeform tables with multiple dimensio

updates.title: Combine report suites from multiple IMS orgsNote:
updates.description: Combine report suites from multiple IMS orgsYou can use the Analytics Source Connector to combine report suites from multiple IMS orgs. This cross-IMS data mapping feature allows organzations to have a combined view of their customer data, even when that customer data is spread across multiple IMS o

updates.title: Header overrides
updates.description: You can specify a header name and secret header value in Content Analytics. This header overrides configuration ensures that Content Analytics sends custom HTTP headers to bypass any bot detection or gate traffic technologies you have implemented.

updates.title: Data storytelling: Generate slide presentations from Workspace reports
updates.description: You can now automatically generate a slide presentation (in .pptx format) that is based on an Analysis Workspace report. Workspace detects key insights in your report and converts them into stakeholder-ready slides. This feature reduces the time and effort required to surface findings, build executi

updates.title: Analyze audiences from Experience Platform Profile datasets in Customer Journey Analytics
updates.description: You can now ingest audience membership data from Experience Platform Profile datasets into a Customer Journey Analytics connection. Audiences become available as new dimensions for use in Analysis Workspace. This is made possible through a new capability in Customer Journey Analytics to ingest XDM o

updates.title: Analytics source connector: Search report suites in Experience Platform
updates.description: If you do have a high number of report suites you can now search for the report suite you want to connect to within the Analytics Source Connector dataflow workflow.

updates.title: Streaming media services: Support schedule data
updates.description: You can now upload scheduled data of past live Streaming Media content to more easily and accurately track viewership. The following are examples of live content that are supported with schedule data upload: Uploading schedule data allows you to track viewership data for individual programs that ran

updates.title: Support for data mirror
updates.description: With support for model-based schemas and change data capture (CDC) functionality for specific source connectors in Experience Platform, Customer Journey Analytics will be able to support data mirror functionality of data warehouse solutions like Snowflake, Azure Databricks, and Google BigQuery. Cont

updates.title: Real-time reporting
updates.description: Real-time reporting in Customer Journey Analytics displays and updates data and visualizations within one or more panels in Analysis Workspace in real time.

updates.title: Filter criteria included in line visualizations and sparklines
updates.description: Any search filter criteria that you apply to a freeform table filter is now always included in sparklines. In addition, you can include search filter criteria in any connected line visualization. You can configure line visualizations to include search filter criteria by selecting the sparkline in th

updates.title: Event Streaming Live Log
updates.description: Live Log is a new tab on the Event Streaming sync detail page that shows a live, real-time stream of events as they're processed by a sync, allowing inspection of raw events, dispatched payloads, and destination responses side by side.

updates.title: Amplitude MCP is now in Slackbot
updates.description: You can now connect Amplitude's MCP server to Slackbot and ask questions there — Slackbot will call Amplitude's tools on your behalf and return the answer inline, without leaving the interface.

updates.title: Search volume for AI Visibility [Beta]
updates.description: We added Search Volume to AI Visibility so customers can prioritize topics and prompts based on real demand, not just visibility.

updates.title: Taxonomy MCP: Branch management and Create tools
updates.description: The Amplitude MCP server now includes branch management and create tools for taxonomy. Customers can now create events, custom events, properties, and use a full suite of branch tools through AI assistants.

updates.title: React Native Session Replay — Privacy Masking
updates.description: RN Session Replay now correctly respects `maskLevel` (light / medium / conservative) on iOS and Android — no more silent downgrade to medium. iOS light masking now auto-masks phone/email keyboard inputs, matching Android and web.

updates.title: New External Guides and Surveys MCP tools
updates.description: Enhancements to the external MCP server now allow AI to properly understand a guide's published state, prioritization, and all other Guides and Surveys concepts for better retrieval on non-Amplitude surfaces.

updates.title: Cohort Sync via MCP: sync_cohort
updates.description: Agents can now trigger a one-time cohort sync to a destination (Braze, Iterable, S3, webhook, and more) straight from MCP. It previews, confirms, then fires the export.

updates.title: Taxonomy API now available on all plans
updates.description: The Taxonomy API is now available to every Amplitude customer, regardless of plan. Starter, Plus, Growth, and Enterprise orgs all have full read and write access via the API with no feature flag or plan gate.

updates.title: Granola AI Feedback Source GA
updates.description: Granola is now generally available for all customers as an AI Feedback source.

updates.title: MCP Server: Role-Based Access Controls
updates.description: Introducing finer-grained control over MCP AI agents with new RBAC actions to scope permissions on a project basis.

updates.title: Agent Connectors
updates.description: Agent Connectors are now GA. Global Agent (and soon, Custom Agents) can pull context from — and take action in — the tools your team already uses. Connecting to the apps you love is as simple as a single click, and because these connectors support both read and write tools, our agents can now do mor

updates.title: E-commerce hubs
updates.description: E-commerce hubs give merchandising and growth teams a curated starting point for analyzing product performance and product discovery in Amplitude with preconfigured commerce workflows.

updates.title: Persisted properties
updates.description: Persisted Properties let teams preserve important behavioral context across a user journey so properties like campaign, entry page, search term, or discovery method stay attached to downstream events like purchases, conversions, and revenue.

updates.title: Zoning Insights
updates.description: Zoning Insights is a powerful tool that quickly identifies which elements on a site are converting visitors or losing them, providing actionable performance data in minutes.

updates.title: Frustration Analytics — Debugger on User Profile Timeline
updates.description: The User Profile Timeline now surfaces frustration signals directly alongside behavioral events, providing a chronological view of exactly what a specific user experienced.

updates.title: Trigger Delay for Guides and Surveys
updates.description: Guides and Surveys offers different trigger types like "On event tracked". Now you can delay the appearance of the guide after the event happens by using the new "Delay" option.

updates.title: Create and edit Guides & Surveys themes with Global Chat
updates.description: Create and edit G&S themes just by sharing a screenshot of your website/figma files or by describing your dream theme with a short text description. Follow up with quick edits like 'make the button height a tad smaller' or 'give the typography a bold look'. Bonus: Use 'Fix with AI' to fix any and al

updates.title: Web Vitals Stacked Chart Ratings View
updates.description: Added a new visualization to Web Vitals hub that displays Web Vitals grouped by rating category (good, needs improvement, poor).

updates.title: Starred Projects
updates.description: Starred projects are a way for users to be able to favorite the projects they most frequently access in Amplitude so that they can be more easily found in project dropdowns.

updates.title: Real-Time Behavior Targeting for Web Experiment [Beta]
updates.description: Real-time behavior targeting is now available for Web Experiment, enabling instant audience targeting based on user behavior.

updates.title: Channel Classifier API: manage channel classifiers programmatically
updates.description: Teams can now manage channel classifiers through a public REST API to list, fetch, create, and update classifiers programmatically.

updates.title: Ask Amplitude AI button in Slack Previews
updates.description: Introducing the Ask Amplitude AI button in Slack previews to enhance user interaction with Amplitude AI features directly from Slack.

updates.title: Web Experiment: Mobile Simulator
updates.description: Preview web experiments in mobile aspect ratios

updates.title: Archive and Restore Guides and Surveys Themes
updates.description: Unlike guides and surveys themselves, themes could not be restored after deleting them. Now, themes work the same as the guide and survey primitives and can be restored after they have been archived.

updates.title: Bulk Unpublishing Guides and Surveys
updates.description: You can now unpublish guides and surveys from the list page by selecting them and then clicking "Unpublish".

updates.title: Error Clicks and Thrashed Cursor
updates.description: Our browser analytics SDK version 2.40.0 captures two new frustration interactions: error clicks and thrashed cursor, helping surface user frustration signals to better understand friction points.

updates.title: Introducing: Amplitude AI Plugin
updates.description: We are excited to announce the launch of the Amplitude AI Plugin, enhancing analytics capabilities with AI-powered insights.

updates.title: Experiment alerts are now in Microsoft Teams
updates.description: Experiment alerts can now be set up directly in Microsoft Teams for your experiment feature flag changes.

updates.title: Web Experiment Chrome Debugger — Targeting Visibility
updates.description: The Amplitude Instrumentation Explorer Chrome extension now shows granular targeting debug details for Web Experiments, making it faster to diagnose why an experiment isn't firing.

updates.title: Session Replay Debug Modal
updates.description: The Amplitude Instrumentation Explorer Chrome extension now includes a Session Replay debug modal you can turn on for pages with Session Replay activity.

updates.title: Session Replay: "Hide Inactivity" toggle is now remembered
updates.description: The "Hide Inactivity" toggle in the Session Replay player now persists across replays and sessions. Once a user sets their preference (on or off), it sticks — no more flipping the toggle every time they open a new replay.

updates.title: Amplitude plugin skills — now available by default in Claude & Cursor
updates.description: Our plugin is now listed by default in Claude and Cursor marketplaces and installable today in Gemini and Codex, unlocking seamless access to Amplitude data and workflows as part of developers' AI tool setup.

updates.title: Data Tables: Global filters now filter all metrics, including session metrics
updates.description: Data Tables global filters now apply to session metrics as well as event columns, enabling consistent filtering across all table columns.

updates.title: Heatmaps Improvements
updates.description: A revamp of Heatmaps to make it simpler, more reliable, and easier to use.

updates.title: AI Visibility 2.0: Sentiment, Recommendations, Event Data, MCP & Premium plan
updates.description: AI Visibility 2.0 goes beyond basic “are we showing up?” checks and tells you how AI actually talks about your product, what to fix, and how those fixes perform. Sentiment, recommendations, data export, and MCP all work together so you can measure perception, act on it, and close the loop in Amplitu

updates.title: Audit Logs
updates.description: Amplitude now provides a dedicated Audit Logs experience in Organization Settings, giving admins visibility into security-relevant activity across their account.

updates.title: AI Assistant
updates.description: AI Assistant brings personalized, in-the-moment support directly into our customer's product or website. It answers user questions using existing docs and knowledge sources, understands what users have actually done in the product, and can guide them forward with contextual help and walkthroughs.

updates.title: Session Replay JSON Path Event Query
updates.description: Improvements to Session Replay allowing querying events using JSON path.

updates.title: Transformed Properties Targeting in Experiment, Feature Flags, and Guides & Surveys
updates.description: You can now use transformed properties (defined in Govern / Taxonomy) directly in Experiment / Feature Flag and Guides & Surveys targeting, ensuring consistent definitions across Analytics and targeting.

updates.title: Strongly Typed Payloads
updates.description: Category: Experiment

updates.title: Multi Instance Support in the Guides and Surveys SDK
updates.description: Some customers have a micro-frontend setup or similar where they are using multiple Amplitude projects in parallel. While the Analytics Browser SDK supports this, Guides and Surveys did not. Now it does and you can show guides and surveys from multiple projects at the same time.

updates.title: Page-Level URL Masking for Session Replay
updates.description: Session Replay now supports per-URL masking rules. You can override the default masking level for specific pages using glob patterns — e.g. apply Conservative masking to `/checkout/**` while keeping Light masking everywhere else — without changing global settings.

updates.title: Global Agent chat sidebar opens by default on large screens
updates.description: On screens 1600px and wider, the Global Agent chat sidebar now opens by default with automatic reopening under certain conditions, improving user messaging and conversion rates.

updates.title: Targeting based on First Seen Timestamp
updates.description: Guides and Surveys now supports targeting new users based on their 'First Seen' timestamp, improving accuracy for new user sessions.

updates.title: Persisting Table Filter in URL & Persisting Collapsed Card State in Experiment/Flags UI
updates.description: Persisting experiment table filters in the URL and persisting collapsed/expanded state in Experiment/Flag views' cards.

updates.title: Multi-action CTA's for Guides & Surveys
updates.description: Guide and survey buttons can now execute multiple actions in sequence, allowing users to chain actions together like navigating to a URL, clicking an element on that page, and then advancing to the next step.

updates.title: Even More External MCP Tools, Agent Skills, and the MCP App!!
updates.description: We've shipped a ton of new tools, skills, and the app over the last few weeks in MCP. There are new MCP tools for Session Replays, Agent Analytics, Feature Flags, and Web Vitals (via Autocapture data) that massively expand the set of analysis possible; an open-source skills repository with fine-tune

updates.title: Improvements to Distributions
updates.description: All distributions should be able to be normalized with added normalization, PDF, and CDF features to make amplitude histograms comparable and more data advanced.

updates.title: Global Agent Audit Tab
updates.description: See all Global Agent activity across your organization in one table, directly in AI Controls.

updates.title: New Filters for List Session Replays
updates.description: Category: Session Replay

updates.title: Mutual Exclusivity
updates.description: Category: Guides and Surveys

updates.title: Edit guide and survey positions without leaving Preview mode
updates.description: Category: Guides and Surveys

updates.title: Guides and Surveys showing up in cohort page's _Used by_ tab
updates.description: Category: Guides and Surveys

updates.title: AI Feedback Ingestion API
updates.description: Send feedback from NPS tools, surveys, review sites, and custom queues into AI Feedback for analysis alongside everything else.

updates.title: Snapchat Ads Cohort Sync Integration released in EU
updates.description: Category: Data

updates.title: Event Time now available in Derived Properties
updates.description: Customers can now use `Event Time` as a selectable property when building Derived Properties. This means you can create derived properties like `registration date - Event Time` to compute things like "days since registration".

updates.title: Session Replay Sentiment Filter
updates.description: Find frustrating or positive sessions in seconds. Sentiment filtering is now built directly into the Session Replay list.

updates.title: AI Assistant Chats ingested into AI Feedback
updates.description: Stop manually sifting through thousands of AI Assistant chats — get instant insight into what users are asking and flagging.

updates.title: Bookmarkable Session Replays
updates.description: Category: Session Replay

updates.title: Replay Insights
updates.description: Replay Insights uses AI to scan your replays at scale and surface a bird's-eye view of what's happening across your entire product

updates.title: Feature Flag and Experiment targeting based on First Seen Timestamp
updates.description: Category: Activation

updates.title: Property Category
updates.description: Category: Data

updates.title: Amplitude Wizard CLI: Agentic Onboarding for Builders
updates.description: The Amplitude Wizard CLI is an AI-powered command-line tool that guides developers through setting up their codebase and tracking events with Amplitude, removing the friction of manual SDK setup and instrumentation decisions.

updates.title: Advanced Channel Classifier Template
updates.description: Every new Amplitude org and project now gets a GA4-aligned default channel classifier automatically — no manual setup required.

updates.title: Multi-Question Steps for Surveys
updates.description: Previously surveys were limited to a single input (question) per step - if you wanted to ask multiple questions you had to do so over the course of several steps. Starting early this month customers are now able to ask up to 10 questions in a single step! A new, optional label input also allows cust

updates.title: Preview mode support for MPA's
updates.description: Preview mode didn't really work for MPA's (multi-page apps) before. Now it does :) This should make initial activation, continuous iteration, and testing much easier for customers with MPA's.

updates.title: Freeform event + property names for G&S triggers
updates.description: Freeform event + property names for Guides & Surveys triggers allow triggering guides/surveys based on events or properties that have not yet been tracked or will never be tracked in Amplitude.

updates.title: Nav Graph Dialog Support for Autocapture
updates.description: Element interactions autocapture now works inside dialogs, capturing interactions in any dialog window that were previously missed.

updates.title: Two cookie problem resolution in latest analytics-browser SDK
updates.description: Fix for an edge-case in the analytics browser SDK where user data was written to one cookie and read from another, causing user profile data resets and session issues.

updates.title: Inline Validation for Required CTAs
updates.description: We replaced the single CTA 'required' tooltip with per-input error messages and borders, so forms with multiple survey inputs now clearly show which specific fields are required. This makes validation much clearer and harder to miss.

updates.title: Experiment Report (powered by Amplitude AI)
updates.description: Experiment Reports automatically generate a structured, AI-powered writeup of your experiment directly inside an Amplitude Notebook with a single click from the new Reports tab on an experiment.

updates.title: Out-of-the-box Widgets
updates.description: Out-of-the-box Widgets let you add prebuilt elements like banners, CTAs, and messages directly from the Visual Editor

updates.title: API Key Management GA Release
updates.description: API Key Management is now GA to all customers, regardless of plan, with a new Rotate function for legacy API key rotation.

updates.title: Guides and Surveys - Adjustable column widths for guides and surveys tables
updates.description: Tables used to be fixed width causing columns to be squished and hard to read as features were added. This is a quick, quality of life update for users so that tables can scale with our rapid feature development.

updates.title: Shareable Agents
updates.description: Users can now set existing agents as discoverable across the org so that others can see the insights and reports being generated.

updates.title: AI Visibility report generation stability improvements
updates.description: Improvements to AI Visibility report generation leading to close to 100% completion rate and better handling of missing data.

updates.title: Session Replay Quick Duration Filter
updates.description: A new duration filter that appears in the filter controls on both the Session Replay list page and the User Profile page, improving result relevance by hiding very short sessions.

updates.title: Dashboard Agent Update
updates.description: We released a new and improved version of the Dashboard Agent with a comparison report that highlights how the current week’s takeaways have changed compared to the prior week, making metric trends easier to understand at a glance.

updates.title: Dashboard Agent Enhancements
updates.description: New features added to the Dashboard Agent including two separate deep dives, improved week-over-week difference analysis, and refined outbound notifications.

updates.title: SR iOS Quality & Upload Config
updates.description: Added iOS Session Replay SDK controls to tune recording quality (trade visual fidelity for performance) and disable uploads over cellular.

updates.title: Syncs Table Improvements
updates.description: Previously, you could only sort on the table columns in the syncs table, limiting your visibility of the status of your syncs. Now, with several new filters and an added column, you can get easy glances at the status of your syncs.

updates.title: G&S - Adjust pin/embeds/tooltip position and offset options directly in your app
updates.description: It's tough for customers to quickly customize positions, size or offsets of anchored/embedded guides and surveys from the preview on amplitude.com. Now they'll be able to easily edit, preview, and 'save' these options from the preview inside their app.

updates.title: Web Experiment: Inline editing + CSS unit selector
updates.description: A couple QoL improvements to the visual editor for web experiment, it now supports inline text editing and a CSS unit selector dropdown for certain attributes.

updates.title: Stale Flag Management
updates.description: Feature flags and experiments are now automatically evaluated for staleness. Flags that have been fully rolled out or rolled back for 30 days are marked as stale, surfaced in the UI, and notify owners to take next steps. Stale dates can be updated, removed, or marked as permanent for long-lived flag

updates.title: Duplicate Guides and Surveys across Platforms
updates.description: Capability to copy a guide or survey to a different platform (app) using the existing 'Duplicate' buttons which now trigger a platform selection modal.

updates.title: GA Versions for the G&S iOS, Android, and React Native SDKs
updates.description: Released GA versions (v3.0.0) for the G&S iOS, Android, and React Native SDKs with a new safety feature and improved stability.

updates.title: Feedback Agent
updates.description: A new agent that automatically surfaces top customer requests, bugs, complaints, and praises from feedback surveys, support tickets, and sales calls from your AI Feedback sources and pushes you async reports!

updates.title: AI Analytics Platform Launch
updates.description: Our platform is going AI-native with the launch of 3 incredible innovations: Global Agent, Specialized Agents, and MCP, transforming how users interact with product analytics.

updates.title: URL Preview Feature Requirement Update
updates.description: Customers must send data using the correct SDK versions to see the URL preview feature.

updates.title: AI Feedback now integrates with Slack
updates.description: You can now connect any Slack channel as a feedback source in AI Feedback.

updates.title: Experiment Evaluation Proxy 1.0.0
updates.description: Evaluation Proxy enables local evaluation across any platform with ultra-low latency. It supports universal local evaluation, exposure tracking, and improved scalability.

updates.title: Edit Dashboard and Notebook Tools for Global Agent and MCP
updates.description: Edit existing dashboards and notebooks

updates.title: Experiment Change Alerts Improvements
updates.description: Support Email as a destination. Only send slack messages when important changes happen that affect flag evaluation and not things like adding links. Include a description of what changed in the flag.

updates.title: Organization and Project-level AI Context in External MCP Calls
updates.description: Organization and project-level AI context is now available in external MCP calls, allowing agents to fetch context set in the Amplitude AI Control Settings.

updates.title: Session Replay MegaModal layout controls + DevTools-style Network tab
updates.description: Resizable panels in the Session Replay MegaModal and a new Chrome DevTools-style network details view to improve usability and debugging in Session Replay.

updates.title: Guides and Surveys - Slack Alerts
updates.description: Set up survey alerts to send survey responses directly to Slack channels

updates.title: Job Details Drawer (For BigQuery)
updates.description: The Job Details Drawer gives customers detailed visibility into the progress and status of their BigQuery data warehouse import jobs, including pipeline stage visualization, detailed record count breakdowns, job duration information, and error log downloads.

updates.title: Browser & Swift Unified SDK
updates.description: The Unified SDK provides a single entry point for all Amplitude features — including Analytics, Experiment, Session Replay, and Guides & Surveys (Browser Unified SDK only) — in one package, reducing instrumentation complexity and overhead for developers.

updates.title: Bing Ads Source Ingestion
updates.description: Marketers can now import Bing ads campaign data into Amplitude to analyze spend and performance alongside product behavior.

updates.title: Unexpected/unplanned event properties inheriting shared property metadata
updates.description: Analytics: Unexpected/unplanned event properties inheriting shared property metadata
